title: The Cowboy.
content:
There was a bold cowboy
        Came out of the west;
    Of all the bold riders,
        This cowboy's the best.

    The horse he brought with him
        Will not run away;
    But stands by the side of
        His master all day.
meaning:
Richard Hunter's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Cowboy."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
